summary: Iteration 8 'Auto-SMS Opt-in Feature' testing complete - All 18 backend tests pass (100%), all 7 frontend tests pass (100%). New auto-SMS feature fully functional with phone number input and 'Text me when I miss something' toggle in Settings.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/me correctly accepts phone and auto_sms fields
GET /api/auth/me returns phone and auto_sms in user object
GET /api/me returns phone and auto_sms in user object
send_auto_sms_if_offline helper properly checks: user offline, auto_sms=true, phone exists, Twilio configured
Auto-SMS hooks exist in: walkie_ping, send_message, add_item (prayer/intention), call_start
Settings page Phone Number input has data-testid='settings-phone' with maxlength=20
Settings page Auto-SMS toggle has data-testid='settings-auto-sms-toggle'
Toggle correctly shows 'Off' when disabled, 'On' when enabled
Toggle correctly disabled (opacity 0.5) when no phone number entered
Save Changes persists phone and auto_sms to user profile
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 complete. Auto-SMS opt-in feature fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Backend - PUT /api/me accepts phone (max 20 chars) and auto_sms fields, GET /api/auth/me and GET /api/me return phone and auto_sms, send_auto_sms_if_offline helper checks user.auto_sms, user.phone, ws_manager.is_online, and Twilio config. (2) Frontend - Settings page has Phone Number input (data-testid='settings-phone') and 'Text me when I miss something' toggle (data-testid='settings-auto-sms-toggle'), toggle disabled when no phone, enabled when phone entered, shows On/Off text. (3) Auto-SMS triggers: walkie ping, direct message, prayer/intention items, incoming calls - all for offline users with auto_sms enabled. Note: Twilio trial account cannot send to unverified numbers, so actual SMS delivery not tested.

backend_auto_sms.get_auth_me: GET /api/auth/me returns phone and auto_sms in user object
backend_auto_sms.get_me: GET /api/me returns phone and auto_sms in user object
backend_auto_sms.members_endpoint: GET /api/members returns users with phone and auto_sms fields

frontend_settings.phone_input: Phone Number input with data-testid='settings-phone', placeholder='+1 (555) 123-4567', maxlength=20
frontend_settings.toggle_disabled_no_phone: Toggle disabled (opacity 0.5) when no phone number
frontend_settings.toggle_enabled_with_phone: Toggle enabled (opacity 1) when phone number entered
frontend_settings.save_changes: Save Changes persists phone and auto_sms with 'Profile updated' toast

regression.call_history: GET /api/calls/history returns list, Call History page loads

mocked_apis_list: Auto-SMS delivery - Twilio trial account cannot send to unverified numbers
mocked_apis.note: Auto-SMS code paths verified but actual SMS delivery not tested due to Twilio trial limitations. The send_auto_sms_if_offline function is called in the right places and checks all required conditions.
